creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
This isn't fully new with pkgbase, Makefile.inc1 targets and release/ infrastructure have used DISTDIR since at least 2005.

I've started working on disentangling them, beginning with some safety belts (e.g. f6575ed0deb0) and explicitly setting DISTDIR to . rather than relying on empty DISTDIR (e.g. 0f7d8b71b45b).
